chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2184 of 2023 Syed Shah Naseem Akhtar & another Versus Syed Muhammad Anwer Kamal & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.10563/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 27.05.2024 None present. -.-.- This is third date of hearing when petitioners and their counsel are called absent. On first date of hearing Mr. Mazhar Ali Advocate held counsel’s brief whereafter it is followed by absence of both the petitioners and their counsel on 01.02.2024. Today is third date of hearing and the situation has not improved. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Accordingly, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
